hero.title: Talat Sao & Vientiane Night Market
hero.subtitle: The ultimate guide to Vientiane's two most iconic markets
hero.cta: View Talat Sao on Google Maps

evolution.title: Evolution of Talat Sao
evolution.desc: Since the 1960s, Talat Sao has been the commercial heart of Laos, evolving from a traditional market to a modern mall while retaining its cultural charm.

textile.title: Weaving Culture
textile.desc: Lao silk and cotton are not just commodities, but cultural symbols passed down through generations.

etiquette.title: Shopping Etiquette
etiquette.desc: Lao people appreciate gentle communication. Bargaining should be done with a smile and politeness.

map.title: Interactive Map & Transportation
map.tuktuk: Tuk-tuk: The most popular way to get around Vientiane. Always agree on the price before boarding.
map.loca: Loca: A convenient and safe ride-hailing app in Laos.
map.walk: Walking: Just a 15-minute walk from Talat Sao to the Night Market.

footer.disclaimer: This site is a non-profit platform for Lao culture and tourism education.
